stories.headline: World War Two veterans arrive in France on anniversary of D-Day
stories.description: Tributes are under way to mark the largest military seaborne operation ever attempted.

stories.headline: ‘Badge of honour’: Israeli settlers shrug off global condemnation
stories.description: Activists claim sanctions fail to reflect either the depth of violence or state complicity in settler attacks.

stories.headline: Supporters of the Cockroach People’s Party hold protest in New Delhi
stories.description: CJP organisers rally supporters to demand the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan.

stories.headline: Euromillions lottery winner dies in suspected Essex hit-and-run
stories.description: Anthony Canty was knocked off his bicycle and an 18-year-old has since been arrested, police say.

stories.headline: Singer Duffy announces her first live gig in more than 15 years
stories.description: The Welsh singer has announced her first concert after a sexual assault led her to step away from public life.
